excerpt.rendered: The 1992 demo that still owns a few of you. We watched it again.

content.rendered:
State of the Art dropped at The Party in 1992 and rewired what people thought a home computer could push at 50Hz.

Three minutes of synced rotoscoped silhouettes, copper-bar finishes, and a kickdrum that landed harder than the OCS palette deserved. Releasable as freeware by Spaceballs.

If you've never seen it, your pulldown emulator can probably run it. We'll wire a mountable ADF in Phase 2.

wp:featuredmedia.alt_text: Mock featured image for State of the Art / Spaceballs
